title: Claim Ledger Schema
description: Machine-readable record the builder agent writes at end-of-turn (via the /checkpoint slash command) so the verifier can validate atomic claims against git diff + test output without inferring intent from transcript prose. See ~/.claude/plans/verifier-pair-infrastructure-v1.md (plan v4.2, Layer 1). A missing or schema-invalid ledger MUST cause the verifier to return verdict='human' with reason='claim_ledger_missing_or_invalid'.

schema_version.description: Schema version. v1 is additive-only. Loaders reject unsupported major versions with a clear error.

status.description: Special value 'missing' is written by the Stop-hook dispatcher when /checkpoint was not called this turn. The verifier sees status='missing' and returns verdict='human' immediately.

turn_id.description: UUID for this turn's bundle. Stable across the dispatcher → verifier handoff.

session_id.description: UUID for the Claude Code session. Multiple turn_ids share one session_id.

lane_id.description: Identifier from the active lane manifest. Determines compliance class, gate config, and verifier rubric selection.

stage.description: Plan-stage reviews verify a plan document; code-stage reviews verify diffs against the lane's acceptance claims.

intent.description: One-line user-requested goal for this turn. e.g. 'Close Codex chunk-3 review High: subject member must match conversation target'.

changed_files.description: Files modified this turn. Empty array is valid for plan-stage turns that only edit plan documents.

acceptance_claims.description: Bullet list of what this turn's changes are SUPPOSED to satisfy. Each claim must be independently verifiable from the diff + tests. The verifier validates each claim's claim_id against the diff.

tests_run.description: Test files executed this turn and their results.

deterministic_gates_observed.description: Self-reported gate results from the builder. The verifier re-runs deterministic gates and compares — discrepancy is itself a finding.

compliance_touch.description: Compliance domains this turn's changes touched. Drives auto-continuation routing.

known_gaps.description: Things explicitly out of scope for this turn or deferred to a later turn. Surfaces incomplete work.

next_action.description: What the builder thinks should happen next. The verifier may override.
